caption: A man with short, dark hair and a groomed beard is recording in a studio with sound-absorbing acoustic panels in the background. He wears over-ear headphones and a black zip-up hoodie over a gray shirt. Positioned directly in front of him is a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting with varying facial expressions. He begins with his eyes partially closed, then looks to his left with an expectant expression. He then shifts his gaze and smiles slightly, finally breaking into a wider, joyful laugh with his eyes closed. The camera remains in a static medium close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and head as his expressions change. There is no on-screen text or logos visible.
